description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a left-hemisphere stroke analysis workflow using the playback recording at ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt. Isolate the left hemisphere by activating only the odd-numbered channels (1, 3, 5, 7) and deactivating the even-numbered channels (2, 4, 6, 8). Set the time series display window to 10 seconds and save a screenshot of the resulting montage to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/left_hemi_montage.png.
